query:
SELECT month, netPremium, totalCredits, totalDebits, tradeCount, updatedAt
FROM monthlyPremiumCache
WHERE month >= '2025-11'
ORDER BY month;

SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(closedAt / 1000), '%Y-%m') AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS trades,
  SUM(CAST(premium AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS total_premium,
  symbol, underlyingType
FROM premiumTracking
WHERE closedAt IS NOT NULL AND closedAt >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP('2025-12-01') * 1000
GROUP BY month, symbol, underlyingType
ORDER BY month, total_premium DESC
LIMIT 50;
